name: Beef Stew/Crockpot
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 pounds Stew beef, cut into 2-inch cubes
2 large Onions (use a Spanish or Vidalia onion for great taste)
1 can Italian stewed tomatoes (14-1/2 oz can)
recipeInstructions:
1. Use a Spanish or Vidalia onion for great taste.
2. Place half of the veggies in the pot.
3. Add beef cubes.
4. Mix flour, pepper, and spices; sprinkle over beef.
5. Add the rest of the veggies and top with stewed tomatoes and their juice.
6. Sprinkle with Worcestershire sauce.
7. Cover and cook on LOW for 8 to 10 hours, or until meat is very tender and veggies are done.
8. Serve with large macaroni cooked separately.
9. Leftovers can be refrigerated in the same pot and reheated in bowls in the microwave at 50% power.
